title: Efficacy, safety and complications of autologous fat grafting to the eyelids
author: Fan Yang
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bstqnemw

steps.title: We will search the PubMed, Cochrane...
steps.instruction: We will search the PubMed, Cochrane library, and Embase databases for articles published prior to November 11, 2020.

steps.title: We will scrutinize the titles, abstracts,...
steps.instruction: We will scrutinize the titles, abstracts, and full text of the retrieved articles and screen out articles that do not meet the inclusion and exclusion criteria.

steps.title: We will perform meta-analysis by a...
steps.instruction: We will perform meta-analysis by a comprehensive meta-analysis software (CMA), version 2.2.050 (Biostat, Englewood, NJ, USA). A random-effects meta-analysis will be conducted to analyze all the evidence.
